message:
test(patterns): metamorphic relations for PatternEngine::detect

Adds crates/frankenterm-core/tests/proptest_patterns_metamorphic.rs —
7 tests (4 proptests @ 256 cases ≈ 1k iterations + 3 hand-rolled
regressions) pinning two metamorphic relations on the live
PatternEngine::detect API. The existing proptest_patterns.rs covers
constructors and serde for the pattern data types; it does NOT
exercise input→output relations on detect itself.

MRs pinned:

1. Determinism
   - `detect_is_deterministic_across_repeated_calls`: two calls on
     the same engine + same text must agree on the multiset of
     (rule_id, matched_text, canonical_extracted).
   - `detect_agrees_across_fresh_engines`: two independently
     constructed engines must agree on the multiset, guarding
     against construction-time seed drift.

2. Append-monotonicity (suffix superset)
   - `detect_on_text_is_submultiset_of_detect_on_text_plus_safe_suffix`:
     appending a delimiter-style "safe suffix" (e.g. "\n[END]\n",
     "\n---\n") to the input must not lose any detection that fired
     on the shorter input.
   - Symmetric prepend-monotonicity variant catches the same class
     of regression in code paths that special-case the start of
     input (buffer wrap-around, tail-buffer prefix logic).

The detection multiset identity excludes `span` because positions
legitimately shift under prepend and stay put under append; what
must not drift is the (rule_id, matched_text, canonical_extracted)
tuple. Extracted JSON is canonicalized (recursive key sort) so
HashMap iteration order in serde cannot cause false multiset
inequality.

Input strategies are biased toward anchors that actually appear in
the built-in Codex / Claude Code / Gemini packs ("less than 5%",
"You've hit your usage limit", "rate limit", "429 Too Many Requests",
"Token usage:", "codex resume <uuid>") so many generated cases drive
real detections instead of hitting the quick-reject short-circuit.

Verified: 7/7 tests pass via
  rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --test proptest_patterns_metamorphic
No regressions surfaced. Domain: patterns metamorphic (pane 5).
